svg.aria-label: Tweet by Andrej Karpathy about LLM knowledge bases
svg.title: Andrej Karpathy — LLM Knowledge Bases

text.tspan: Something I'm finding very useful recently: using
LLMs to build personal knowledge bases for various
topics of research interest. In this way, a large
fraction of my recent token throughput is going
less into manipulating code, and more into
